programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.sub-title: I See It Landing in Our Backyard and I Was Trapped
programme.desc: (M) A Texas man's life is forever changed when a UFO chases him and his father down on a rural road. A teenager is stalked by a humanoid creature in the backwoods of West Virginia.

programme.title: Ghost Loop
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: (M) Kentucky's Octagon Hall is known for its paranormal activity, but it's turned violent since the founder died. Staff are terrified, and the director may have to shut it down.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.
